free_text: Neutron capture cross section in 64Zn
Detectors details.
Oak Ridge electron linear accelerator.
Circular disk of zinc oxide,
1.3-cm radius, 0.6-cm thick. Mass is 6.73-grams,
Pair of total energy gamma detectors placed on either
side of sample
Corrections made for sample thickness, doppler
broadening, energy resolution, and scattered neutron
sensitivity of detectors.
Energy range moved to san 2.
DR format updated and entries 3 (stat-W g)
4 (units and  assumed 5) corrected.
BP: Updated entry, sample,  added doi,
digitized data.
Figs. 1-5, pages 684-685.
BP: Digitized data.
Factor in elastic widths is neutron sensitivity factor.
Breit-Wigner
No comprehensive details on uncertainties.
DATA-ERR description speaks only about the
uncertainty in the resonance energy: The uncertainty
in the resonance energies is estimated as +-E/1200,
based on the assumption that the resonance peaks
could be determined to about one-half the resolution
width at all energies. From a comparison of the
channel energies obtained in the present measurement
with the energies from transmission measurements, we
observed that the present energies are systematically
lower than the transmission energies by about 0.1%.
We tend to feel that the transmission values are more
accurate in view of their higher energy resolution
and consequently we have adopted these energy values.
May be doublet or multiplet
Table I, page 686.
BP: Included ERR-ANALYS and STATUS.
